key_takeaways: Medium problems: Kadane, 3Sum, Merge Intervals, Product Except Self — 15 min target
Always state pattern first: 'This is a sliding window / two pointer / DP problem'
If stuck at 10 min: brute force + communicate why you want to optimize
Test with given example + your own + edge case
Medium is the bread-and-butter of SDE-1 interviews at all Indian tech companies
